channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Alternative armor designs
item.description: With this mod, you can make use of all game armor designs for each equivalent armor type.

item.title: Immersive Machina
item.description: A compatibility bridge between Immersive Mining and Eco Machina!

item.title: Struggle To Sleep
item.description: Not snuggle, STRUGGLE! You can only sleep if certain conditions are met.

item.title: Salty´s Clear View
item.description: Fades blocks blocking the third person camera!

item.title: CollapseStory
item.description: Adds structural and material physics to building blocks, and greatly expands beam functionality.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Stratum - High-performance server software.
item.description: Focused on smoother multiplayer servers, better performance under load and, practical tools.

item.title: Fluffy Dreg
item.description: Adds a Fluffy Dragon/Kobold player model/race using Player Model Lib.

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Stoneworks
item.description: Adds concrete, crushed stone aggregate, metal bricks, and more.

item.title: HUD Clock
item.description: A compact, configurable heads-up display for Vintage Story.

item.title: Vanilla Varnished Planks
item.description: Adds ten types of treated wood, based on the uncraftable wood on fine furniture and missing colours

item.title: Specialized Backpacks
item.description: A few backpacks that provide buffs to the wearer, and of course more inventory space.

item.title: Immersive Rope Crafting FORK
item.description: Allows you to braid rope in world for cheaper and with more options for ingridients

item.title: Sound Of Confession
item.description: Adds church bells.

item.title: Fast Mushroom Harvesting
item.description: You don't need tools to pick mushrooms, it's easy and quick to pick them by hand.

item.title: Humans-Nudity Patch
item.description: Adds nude option to races from Humans

item.title: Temporal Storage
item.description: A simple Storage Solution using the power of Temporal Entanglement! (Now with Crafting!~)

item.title: Kaschperle Class Mix
item.description: A revision mix from the popular class mod Aldi classes and Agi's Classes

item.title: Arrows and Slings
item.description: Buff arrows and adds sling progression

item.title: Auto Walk Extended
item.description: Allows toggling walk (autowalk) and sneak (autosneak). Also supports walking uphill (stepup).

item.title: Wild Farming Fork
item.description: Cultivate flowers, herbs, mushrooms, trees, and shrubs. And much more.

item.title: Simple Rock Crafting
item.description: A simple mod that allows you to craft rock blocks out of 8 stones and a hammer.

item.title: Mad Hoarding
item.description: An extension to Food Shelves and Purposeful Storage to increase capacity of some containers and alte

item.title: Resonator Tweaks
item.description: Simple mod to play the resonator as a sound effect. Will play with music off .

item.title: Resonator Overhaul
item.description: Per-resonator volume, falloff and looping — saved to the world and audible with Music off.

item.title: ReelMower
item.description: Push reel mower. Cut grass, Multiplayer in testing

item.title: KRPG Enchantment
item.description: Adds MC-like enchantment system to VS.

item.title: Riley's Classes [ALPHA]
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!
